content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty is down 0.37% with broad-based weakness in financials (Bank Nifty -1.32%, PSU Bank -1.98%) but pockets of strength in Energy (+0.86%) and Metals. India VIX at 18 indicates elevated uncertainty. Existing book is mixed with PNBHOUSING the standout winner; multiple positions hovering near entry. Day's session is half-spent and book is already 45% deployed — focus is position management, not new aggressive entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already at +5.6% with SL at 1025 (above entry 984) — locks in ~4% gain. Original SL is already trailed nicely. No change needed but keeping target at 1095. Actually current SL=1025 == stored 1025, so emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong position +5.6%, SL already trailed to 1025 (above entry, locking ~4% gain). Stock consolidating between 1036-1055 today. Q4 beat thesis intact, dividend upcoming. SL is comfortably tight; target 1095 only 5.4% away. No changes needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.6%, but SL at 119 still ~3.3% away. Gold ETF as portfolio hedge given elevated VIX (18) and geopolitical tensions. SMA20 at 122.12 acting as support. Hold for now — not yet at SL, thesis intact as macro hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, SL at 1425 already above entry 1412.94 (locking ~0.85% gain). At 52w high (1437.90) with strong Q4 print. SL is already tight; current values match — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% gain, SL already at breakeven+ (1425 vs entry 1412.94). At 52w high — momentum strong on Q4 beat (PAT +27%). SL adequately placed; target 1465 within reach. No-op MODIFY avoided."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Currently +0.7% (CMP 407). SL at 402 is 0.5 below entry 404.50 — barely below entry. Tightening SL to 405 (just above entry 404.50) to lock in breakeven+. Stock made fresh 52w high today before fading. Q4 results May 15 catalyst ahead. Target 425 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.6%, SL at 1735 is essentially at entry 1734 — already locked in. Current values match stored — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +0.6%, SL at 1735 already at breakeven. Organon deal driving volume (5.3x) but research notes leverage concerns. Bearish MACD crossover signals caution. Letting stop-loss do its job at breakeven; target 1830 is intact upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginally negative (-0.3%), SL at 315 (1.7% below entry, within budget). Stock consolidating near 52w high. Q4 results May 19. Defensive transmission play with steady fundamentals. Hold and let setup develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Slightly negative (-0.6%), SL at 463 (1.3% below entry). Stock reached 473 intraday on Q4 beat (+12% PAT) but faded. Dividend Rs 5.25 declared. Thesis intact; SL well-placed. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1025 (above entry), locking in ~4% gain. Letting winner run toward 1095 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, SL at 119 (3.3% buffer). Holding for portfolio diversification given elevated VIX."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry. At 52w high on strong Q4. Letting it work toward target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL from 402 to 405 — moving to just above entry to lock in breakeven. Strong sector but stock pulled back from 414 high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1735 already at breakeven. Bearish MACD warning sign — let SL handle exit if Organon-deal euphoria fades."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, SL at 315 within 2% risk budget. Q4 results May 19."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat, dividend declared. SL at 463 well-placed. Energy theme intact."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AARTIIND breaking 52w high with 2.2x volume on chemicals strength — but Q4 results May 4 is binary risk in 4 trading days, deferring entry. NAM-INDIA gap-up to ATH on 29% PAT growth — wait for consolidation/dip toward 1000-1010. ONGC at 52w high on Brent spike — chase risk; better to wait for pullback. JSWENERGY breaking out but already have NTPC + POWERGRID + pending TATAPOWER limit = power cluster heavy. GLENMARK strong pharma breakout but already have SUNPHARMA pharma exposure. TATACHEM is Tata Sons listing speculation, not tradeable. Avoiding new entries to maintain discipline given mid-session timing and 45% already deployed.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed across 7 positions. Sector exposure: Power/Energy heavy already (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA + pending TATAPOWER limit = ~24% if filled, approaching cluster limits). Plus existing PHARMABEES and HINDZINC pending limits. Three OPEN orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) sitting unfilled — keeping them as-is since thesis intact, but NOT stacking new orders. Rolling 5-day P&L is negative (profit factor 0.4x, win rate 14%) — this is a clear signal to reduce activity, not increase it. Today's action is TRAIL SL on NTPC and let winners run. NO new entries this tick. Capital preservation > FOMO."
}
